smells.name: Workflow Gate Missing
smells.trigger: A slice attempts to proceed or land without required stage evidence, landing verdict, or landing action evidence.

smells.name: Operator Input Boundary
smells.trigger: Required product direction, UAT, policy, business, or explicit cost/risk input is missing.

smells.name: UAT Approval Boundary
smells.trigger: A feature slice needs UAT approval, has stale UAT, or changed code after approval.

smells.name: Evidence Freshness
smells.trigger: Tests, review evidence, UAT, landing verdicts, or source-drift checks no longer apply to the current source.

smells.name: CodeRabbit Waiver Or Request Changes
smells.trigger: CodeRabbit has actionable comments, stale status, unresolved request changes, or a proposed waiver.

smells.name: Adversarial Review Required
smells.trigger: A PR or slice requires baseline local Qwen review or stronger review before landing.

smells.name: Security Privacy Auth Boundary
smells.trigger: Work touches authentication, authorization, secrets, privacy posture, trust boundaries, or sensitive data handling.

smells.name: Data Integrity Boundary
smells.trigger: Work changes durable records, canonical workflow state, migrations, destructive updates, or reconciliation behavior.

smells.name: Schema Or Migration Boundary
smells.trigger: Work adds or changes schemas, migration contracts, validation shape, or persisted artifact versions.

smells.name: Infra Deploy Release Billing Boundary
smells.trigger: Work touches infrastructure, deploys, releases, billing, paid services, or irreversible operational actions.

smells.name: Parser Validator Boundary
smells.trigger: Work changes parsers, validators, refusal paths, schema checks, or artifact readers and writers.

smells.name: JSONL Log Boundary
smells.trigger: Work changes JSONL append, replay, lifecycle event, or audit log behavior.

smells.name: Registry Index Authority Boundary
smells.trigger: Work adds registries, caches, indexes, or UI state that might become hidden authority over repo-native artifacts.

smells.name: Generated Schema Boundary
smells.trigger: Work introduces generated schemas or generated artifacts that could obscure the maintained source contract.

smells.name: Large Scope
smells.trigger: A slice is broad enough to mix unrelated behaviors, artifacts, gates, or refactors.

smells.name: Multi-Phase Orchestration
smells.trigger: A single implementation path mixes planning, validation, subprocesses, writes, review, landing, or retrospective capture.

smells.name: Test Boundary Violation
smells.trigger: Implementation weakens Test Writer-owned assertions or changes tests without recorded test-change rationale.

smells.name: Missing Coverage
smells.trigger: Important behavior, refusal paths, state transitions, or evidence freshness checks lack tests or an explicit bootstrap gap.

smells.name: Repeated Repair Loop
smells.trigger: A slice needs repeated repairs for the same class of issue or exposes a recurring workflow failure.

smells.name: Context Pressure
smells.trigger: The task requires enough state, files, or history that future agents may lose the operating contract.

smells.name: Unavailable Agent Or Gate
smells.trigger: A required reviewer, agent, or integration does not exist yet during bootstrap.

smells.name: Malformed Evidence
smells.trigger: Required evidence exists but omits required fields, uses unsupported values, or cannot be parsed.

smells.name: Policy Drift
smells.trigger: Implementation, templates, docs, or routing decisions diverge from AGENTS.md, CONTEXT.md, CLEAN_CODE.md, or stage rubrics.
